subcodes.first_line: O servant at the threshold of Bahá, thy letter was received and perused. At the sacred Threshold of the Ancient Beauty and the Name [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده درگاه بها نامه شما رسید و ملاحظه گردید و باستان مقدس جمال قدم و اسم
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @prayer for spiritual recognition
